shows.name: Viiibes
shows.desc: DJ Blackhat plays whatever they feel the vibes are that week. Is it punk? Is it rock? Is it rap? Is it reading a textbook aloud? Who knows!

shows.name: Alara In The Morning
shows.desc: Start your day screaming with Alara. Part of a complete breakfast.

shows.name: the rat zone
shows.desc: Enter the rat zone with DJ The Rat Man and lets talk about our time on this earth.

shows.name: The Mezzanine
shows.desc: A showcase of musicals and other various albums from movies or bands of personal significance. Classic progressive rock tunes to Broadway and stories of how Seal came across some of the most influential music in her life.
